description_long: This is a military-style, olive-green coupe car with a boxy, utilitarian design and open-top configuration. The vehicle features flat, angular body panels with visible reinforcement ridges, and a spare tire mounted on the hood. The front grille is simple, flanked by round headlights, and the windshield is upright and split. The car has two rows of seating, minimalistic interior details, and four doors with horizontal paneling. The wheels are relatively thin with whitewall tires, and the rear includes a flat cargo area and a visible license plate.
description: A boxy, olive-green open-top coupe car with a spare tire on the hood, reinforced body panels, and whitewall tires.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upright windshield, spare tire on the hood, round headlights, and simple grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flat body panels, two doors, open cabin, and visible interior seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat cargo area, rear license plate, and reinforced paneling.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open-top design, two doors, and minimalistic interior.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with two side windows per side
